Goldman Sachs' U.S. Inflation Monitor (released April 20) confirms March 2026 headline CPI at 3.29% YoY (up 0.87% MoM) and PCE at 3.45% YoY, driven by 45% oil spike to $103/barrel from Iran war, though core inflation decelerates with forecasts for 2.2% PCE by late 2026 enabling potential Fed cuts[1][2].
